title: Record hard66 abs55k and pblock6 densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Hard66 Abs55 Pblock6 Contract

## Hard 66
hard compaction block ratio defaults to 0.66 so long sessions stop earlier before attention rot

## Abs 55k
absolute trigger tokens default to 55000 so large-context models reclaim sooner

## Pblock 6/3
parallel summarize block threshold/target defaults to 6k/3k for denser multi-chunk compaction

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy vitest
